description: Composition White T-shirt made of cotton fabric, has a round ribbed neck, short sleeves and a batman graphic on the front Fit Regular Wash care Hand wash with like colours Use only non-chlorine bleach when needed Line dry Do not iron on print Do not dry clean Display your belief in fighting for justice with this batman T-shirt. Stylish and debonair as the legendary character himself, this T-shirt transports you back to the times when you only saw the millionaire-turned-vigilante Bruce Wayne in comic books. Pair it with denims and arty canvas shoes. Model statistics The product is a size M on a model of height 6' and shoulders 18"
